# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources: 
  - name: vnetName_1   # Unique identifier of the resource group, e.g., myVNetRG   
    type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks    
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01     
    location: eastus      
    properties:         
        addressSpace:          
            - name: AddressSpaceName   # Unique identifier of the resource group, e.g., myASRG        
              type: "Microsoft.Network/addressSpaces"    
              startIpEndPoint: 10.254.0.3   
      subnets:         
            - name: SubnetName   # Unique identifier of the resource group, e.g., mySubNetRG        
              serviceEndpointPolicy: Private
